chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 2047 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.8041/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on CMA No.8042/2025 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of main case 02.12.2025 Mr. Sadam Hussain Shambani, Advocate for the Petitioner >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press this petition and submits that in the first instance the petitioner will approach the Department for redressal of his grievance. Order accordingly. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
